questions.question: 1. Piston pin is also known as:

explanations.a: Incorrect. A crank pin is part of the crankshaft, not the piston.
explanations.b: Correct. A piston pin is also known as a gudgeon pin (or wrist pin).
explanations.c: Incorrect. Fastening pin is not the correct technical term.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Connecting pin is not the proper name for a piston pin.

questions.question: 2. The small end of the connecting rod attaches to:

answers.c: The piston pin, gudgeon pin or wrist pin

explanations.a: Incorrect. The crank pin connects to the big end of the connecting rod.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Fastening pin is not the correct component.
explanations.c: Correct. The small end of the connecting rod connects to the piston pin (gudgeon pin or wrist pin).
explanations.d: Incorrect. Connecting pin is not the correct term.

questions.question: 3. The big end of the connecting rod connects to the:

answers.d: Bearing journal on the crank throw

explanations.a: Incorrect. The wrist pin connects to the small end.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Bolts hold the big end cap but do not connect it to the crankshaft.
explanations.c: Incorrect. One of the options provided is correct.
explanations.d: Correct. The big end connects to the bearing journal on the crank throw.

questions.question: 4. Connecting rods for internal combustion engines need to be:

explanations.a: Incorrect. Heavy rods increase inertia forces and vibration.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Medium weight is not ideal for high-speed engines.
explanations.c: Correct. Connecting rods should be lightweight to reduce inertia forces while maintaining strength.
explanations.d: Incorrect. One of the listed options is correct.

questions.question: 5. Popular materials used in the construction of connecting rods are:

explanations.a: Incorrect. Titanium is used in high-performance engines but not commonly in all applications.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Aluminium is used in some cases but not the most common material.
explanations.c: Incorrect. The most commonly used material for connecting rods is forged steel.
explanations.d: Correct. Forged steel is the most popular material, so the given options are not the primary choice.
